sourceMovie.title: Intimacy
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Intimacy works as a romance movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The romance and drama blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Fifty Shades Freed
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Intimacy clicked for you, Fifty Shades Freed (2018) is a strong next stop: both trade in romance and drama, with emotional whiplash that feels honest. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Intimacy?
faq.answer: Try Fifty Shades Freed, Fifty Shades Darker, The Dreamers—each shares DNA with Intimacy while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Intimacy?
faq.answer: Intimacy (2001) is best described as Romance, Drama, Fantasy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Intimacy worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.2/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this romance lane.
